narrative.headline: The 2020 Silverado 1500's most-reported trouble spots: engine and drivetrain
narrative.summary: Engine and powertrain complaints dominate owner reports for this truck, with the most common accounts describing sudden loss of power accompanied by multiple warning lights illuminating while driving. Powertrain complaints frequently involve the vehicle rolling uncontrollably after being placed in park, while braking failures — sometimes alongside electrical warning cascades — round out the major concern areas. Several reports across engine, powertrain, and electrical categories mention fire incidents.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle suddenly losing power and slowing drastically while driving, accompanied by simultaneous illumination of the ESC caution, check engine, and brake warning lights. · 2 fire

issues.sample: PUT TRUCK INTO PARK AND SHUT OFF, STARTED TO GET OUT BUT TRUCK WAS STARTING TO ROLL, TRIED TO STOP IT, PUSHED ON BRAKES, NO EFFECT, KEPT ROLLING AND GAINED MOMENTUM TILL IT HIT OUR CABIN AND STOPPED. LENGTH WAS 200FT APPX OF ROLL. MESSAGE CENTER SAID " PRESS BRAKE TO START " WHIC
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle rolling uncontrollably after being shifted into park and shut off, with the brakes providing no response to stop the movement. · 2 fire

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the brake pedal failing to slow or stop the vehicle when depressed, including incidents where the vehicle did not respond while traveling through an intersection. · 3 crash

issues.sample: BRAND NEW TRUCK WITH ONLY 450 MILES.   FIRST INCIDENT WAS CHECK ENGINE LIGHT CAME ON , BRAKE PEDAL WAS REALLY HARD TO PRESS ALMOST HIT CAR INFRONT OF ME.  SECOND INCIDENT ALL LIGHTS CAME BACK UP   ABS,SRS, TRAILER BRAKE MODULE, PARKING BRAKE,  TRUCK WILL NOT GO FASTER THAN 42MPH.
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report cascading warning lights — including check engine, ABS, SRS, and trailer brake indicators — appearing together, sometimes accompanied by a stiff, unresponsive brake pedal on vehicles with very low mileage. · 8 fire · 2 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: 71 reports (10%) about steering, with 1 tied to a crash.
